query:
SELECT 
  id,
  status,
  createdAt,
  DATE(createdAt) as backup_date,
  TIME(createdAt) as backup_time,
  errorMessage
FROM backup_logs
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
